instructions.purpose: Remove a previously scheduled recurring cron job so it no longer fires. Use this tool when the user explicitly asks to cancel or stop a scheduled reminder or periodic task.

tool.name: unschedule-recurring
tool.description: Deletes a recurring cron job by its unique name. The job will no longer fire after being unscheduled. Returns the removed job details.

usage_rules.rule: Always confirm with the user which job they want to remove before calling this tool
Use the exact job name that was provided when the job was originally scheduled
Inform the user once the job has been successfully removed
If the job name does not exist, inform the user that no matching job was found

example.context: User says: "Już nie potrzebuję przypomnienia o paddu"
example.reasoning: User wants to cancel their paddu reminder by name.
User wants to cancel the study check-in job.
